Located behind one of the sculptures, on the base. It will be on the right side when going through the entrance. **Recommended Vehicle:** Foot, Car

Located inside an open, green shipping container resting flush against the building.

Located on the southwestern corner of the helipads on the roof of the Central Los Santos Medical Center. **Recommended Vehicle:** Helicopter

title: Spaceship Part

Spaceship Part

On a couch in the homeless camp, near a blue tarp just east of a small power station. The camp is underneath Olympic Freeway, on the West side of Elgin Ave.

title: Spaceship Part
popupHtml:
Spaceship Part

Located on the topmost scaffolding between two vertical billboards next to the Liquor Hole store, at the southeast edge of the Vespucci Canals. Access via a ladder in the back of the store.

title: Spaceship Part

Spaceship Part

Located on the center divider of the river dam. Use the walkways and ladders to descend.

title: Spaceship Part
popupHtml:
Spaceship Part

Located on the roof of the Penris building, just behind the sign on the front. **Recommended Vehicle:** Helicopter

title: Spaceship Part
popupHtml:
Spaceship Part

In the back lot of the Richards Majestic Movie Studio, just NorthEast of the Stage 13/14 building. Part is on the third floor roof (fourth floor balcony) of one of the Spanish villas, next to a pile of lumber, accessible via stairway most of the way and a wall climb for the last portion. *Note: If you have not completed certain missions, you will get a 2 Star wanted level for entering the lot.* **Recommended Vehicle:** Foot

title: Spaceship Part
popupHtml:
Spaceship Part

In the drained pool on top of the hotel roof, next door to LS Customs. **Recommended Vehicle:** Helicopter

Spaceship Part

Located underwater beneath the west side of the dock at the Land Act Dam.

Located at the opening of a large drainage pipe on the left in the river bed.

Located on a small beach beside the large rock arch formation.

Located next to a tree in front of the main house of the drug recovery facility.

Located on the eastern side of the roof of the Galileo Observatory. There are stairs leading up to the roof on the right side of the building. _Tip: A helicopter can be landed on the roof beside the part._

Located beside a telescope on a small pad outside of this house looking over the mountainside.

Located underwater, inside the cove on the eastern side. **Recommended Vehicle:** Heli, Boat, Foot

title: Spaceship Part

Spaceship Part

On the underside of the bridge. The part is just north of the center of the southernmost arch on the sea side of the bridge. if you are _very_ careful you can land a helicopter on the underside of the bridge beside the part. Otherwise you'll need to use a parachute.

This spaceship part can be found inside the Fire Fighting Exercise Tower in Paleto Bay, on the third floor.

Spaceship Part can be found in **Paleto Forest**. The part is hidden up a low, gentle slope near Highway One in a culvert.

Spaceship Part can be found in **Paleto beach**. The part is hidden on a tiny peninsula just offshore.

Spaceship Part can be found in **Grapeseed**. The part is hidden out in the open near a cowshed on the ranch.

Spaceship Part can be found in cape catfish near the **San Chainski Mountains**. The part is hidden in the boathouse next to the pier.

title: Spaceship Part
popupHtml:
Spaceship Part

Next to a dust curtain at the Metro Station construction site, underground. Accessible via a tunnel entrance off the East bound lane of Del Perro Freeway, under Alta Street. *Note: The part is located in the same place as the often hard to find Online Gang Attack in the same underground Metro Station construction site.*

title: Spaceship Part

On the East side of the Simmet Alley Market, in an alley between Bean Machine and SND Textiles.

title: Spaceship Part

Spaceship Part

inside a cave next to the river.

title: Spaceship Part
popupHtml:
Spaceship Part

On the roof of the little tower overlooking Vinewood Lake. Helicopter is easiest way to access - there's no access to the roof from the from the barricaded walkway leading to the tower. _Tip: Use a motorcycle, ATV, bike, or small car as seen in the screenshot and push it up against the tower to climb up. Cars like that can spawn in the neighbourhood to the south._

title: Spaceship Part
popupHtml:
Spaceship Part

Next to the blue dumpster behind Hangar #1 at the back of LS International Airport. *Note: If you don't own a hangar with the chosen character, you will receive an immediate wanted level.* - **Recommended Vehicle:** Helicopter, Car

title: Spaceship Part

On a small island in the long water pool running along the right side of the 7th Hole fairway of the LS Golf Club.

In the middle of the West side grassy area next to upper parking driveway, middle level of the Rockford Plaza. **Recommended Vehicle:** Car, Helicopter

This Spaceship Part can be found in **Paleto Bay** at the **Donkey Punch farm**. The part is hidden at the back of a large dilapidated barn.
